summary: Script: good bash practices (set -euo, quoting, error handling). Critical workflow issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (supply-chain risk); (2) workflow references fixture files ($FIXTURES/basic-rules.conf, etc., lines 39-59) that don't exist in deliverable—workflow cannot run; (3) test setup repetitive (10+ identical pattern: echo/$TMPF/run_test calls, lines 39-48+) should factor into helper function. Script itself is solid, but workflow is non-functional as delivered.
